FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.30sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7ff5e3f73100>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-08T19:20:05Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-08T19:18:27Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-08T19:20:05Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-08T19:18:27Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/08 19:21:45.359351400 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359357118 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359386393 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359387284 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359405662 {
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359406473 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359419182 new <- list()
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359419863 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359434115 new$width <- width
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359434996 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359449488 new$height <- height
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359450199 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359464816 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359467249 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359490310 new$title <- title
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359491291 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359511992 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359512824 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359557110 new$version <- version
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359558152 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359572193 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359572944 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359586925 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359587626 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359601447 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359602259 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359615238 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359616019 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359629730 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359630842 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359646075 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359646826 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359679876 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359680777 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359696411 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359697222 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359711824 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359712866 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359727578 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359728349 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359743342 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359744243 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359762490 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359763762 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359780528 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359781329 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359798315 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359799136 "default"))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359815370 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359816121 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359829992 }
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359830734 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359844975 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359845746 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359860388 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359861200 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359876903 }
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359877594 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359890654 }
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359891385 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359904715 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359905436 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359940670 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359941711 domain = NA)
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359957986 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359958717 }
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359971887 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359972658 old$family <- family
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359987841 }
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359988612 version <- old$version

2026/05/08 19:21:45.360002052 "2.0")

2026/05/08 19:21:45.360016314 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360032518 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360033239 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360058888 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360059659 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360075964 domain = NA)
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360076735 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360092909 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360093610 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360112359 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360113110 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360134352 invisible()

2026/05/08 19:21:45.359351400 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359357118 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359386393 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359387284 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359405662 {
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359406473 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359419182 new <- list()
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359419863 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359434115 new$width <- width
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359434996 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359449488 new$height <- height
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359450199 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359464816 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359467249 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359490310 new$title <- title
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359491291 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359511992 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359512824 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359557110 new$version <- version
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359558152 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359572193 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359572944 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359586925 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359587626 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359601447 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359602259 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359615238 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359616019 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359629730 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359630842 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359646075 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359646826 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359679876 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359680777 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359696411 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359697222 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359711824 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359712866 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359727578 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359728349 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359743342 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359744243 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359762490 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359763762 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359780528 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359781329 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359798315 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359799136 "default"))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359815370 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359816121 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359829992 }
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359830734 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359844975 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359845746 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359860388 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359861200 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359876903 }
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359877594 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359890654 }
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359891385 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359904715 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359905436 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359940670 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359941711 domain = NA)
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359957986 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359958717 }
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359971887 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359972658 old$family <- family
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359987841 }
2026/05/08 19:21:45.359988612 version <- old$version

2026/05/08 19:21:45.360002052 "2.0")

2026/05/08 19:21:45.360016314 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360032518 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360033239 onefile <- old$onefile

2026/05/08 19:21:45.360059659 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360075964 domain = NA)
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360076735 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360092909 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360093610 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360112359 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360113110 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/08 19:21:45.360134352 invisible()
